faq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.title: Got questions?
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

q1.question: Is the website really delivered in 6 hours?
q1.answer: Yes. Once we receive your content, our team starts immediately. Most websites are delivered the same day. If we can't meet the deadline, you don't pay.

q2.question: How does the process work step by step?
q2.answer:
1. Fill out the contact form below — tell us as much as you can about your business and what you need.
2. We get back to you within 24 hours. We'll send you a short intake form to gather the details (business info, content, branding) — or we can hop on a quick call if you prefer.
3. You send us your content (text, images, logo) via email — we help if you don't have everything ready.
4. We build your website and send you a preview.
5. You review it and request changes if needed — one revision round is free.
6. Once you're happy, you pay and we go live.

q3.question: What if I don't like the result?
q3.answer: Every plan includes a free revision round. We'll adjust the design, layout, or content until you're happy. Your satisfaction is guaranteed before payment.

q4.question: What if I need a booking system, online payments, or a custom solution?
q4.answer: We build it. Just tell us what you need — we'll take care of the rest.

q5.question: What technology does the website run on?
q5.answer:
The same technology trusted by Apple, Netflix, Spotify, Airbnb, and Porsche. Your site is fully encrypted, loads instantly worldwide, and has 99.99% uptime.

For the technically curious: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion, Radix UI, Bun — hosted on Vercel's global edge network, with Neon serverless database and Supabase backend services.

q6.question: Will my site show up on Google?
q6.answer: Yes. Every site we build is optimized for search engines — fast loading, mobile-friendly, and properly structured. These are the key factors Google uses to rank websites.

q7.question: What happens after my website goes live?
q7.answer: We set up everything for you — hosting, security, encryption, global performance. You own your website fully, and if you ever need anything, we're just a message away.

q8.question: Do I really only pay after delivery?
q8.answer: Yes — we only ask for a small 10% deposit upfront, just as a confirmation. The rest you pay after you've seen the result and you're happy with it.

q9.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q9.answer: Bank transfer, online card payment, or cash. Simple, secure, no hassle.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use it, and how we keep it safe.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.content:
Révész Péter EV (sole proprietor)
Trade name: Budapest Labs
Seat: Budapest, Hungary
Tax number: 91808745-1-43
Registration number: 61944978
Email: budapestlabs@gmail.com

(Hereinafter referred to as "Budapest Labs")

collection.title: What we collect
collection.content: When you fill out our contact form, we receive: your name, email address, phone number (if you choose to share it), business name (optional), selected plan, and your message. That's it. We don't use cookies, tracking scripts, or analytics tools of any kind.

basis.title: Why we're allowed to use it
basis.content: We handle your data because you chose to send it to us — that's your consent under EU data protection law (GDPR). If we start working together, we also need your details to deliver the project. In some cases, we may keep records to meet legal or accounting requirements.

purpose.title: What we do with it
purpose.content: We use your contact details only to get back to you, put together a quote, and build your website. We will never sell, rent, or share your information with anyone for marketing or any unrelated purpose.

storage.title: How we keep it safe
storage.content: Your data is stored on encrypted servers within the European Union. Invoices and accounting records are kept for 8 years as required by Hungarian accounting law (Act C of 2000, §169). Other business correspondence and project data is kept for the duration of our working relationship, plus up to 5 years afterwards. After that, it's permanently deleted.

thirdparty.title: Services we rely on
thirdparty.content: To run our website and communicate with you, we use a hosting provider and an email service. These providers only process data on our behalf and are bound by GDPR-compliant agreements. Your information is never shared with anyone else.

hosting.title: Website hosting
hosting.content: Our website uses HTTPS encryption on every connection. The hosting provider only keeps standard server logs (IP address, timestamp, page visited), which are automatically deleted after 30 days.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.content: Under EU law (GDPR), you can: ask to see what data we have about you; correct anything that's wrong; ask us to delete your data; limit or object to how we use it; or request a copy in a portable format. You can also withdraw your consent at any time — this won't affect anything we did before the withdrawal. Just email us at budapestlabs@gmail.com and we'll take care of it.

complaint.title: Something not right?
complaint.content: If you feel your data hasn't been handled properly, you can file a complaint with the Hungarian data protection authority (NAIH) at naih.hu, or with the supervisory authority in your country.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.content: Questions about your data? Email us at budapestlabs@gmail.com. We'll get back to you within 30 days.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These are the terms that apply when you work with Budapest Labs. We've kept them straightforward — no surprises.

provider.title: Service provider
provider.content:
Révész Péter EV (sole proprietor)
Trade name: Budapest Labs
Seat: Budapest, Hungary
Tax number: 91808745-1-43
Registration number: 61944978
Email: budapestlabs@gmail.com

(Hereinafter referred to as Budapest Labs)

scope.title: What we do
scope.content: We design and build websites for small businesses. Depending on your plan, this can include: custom design and development, mobile-friendly layouts, hosting and deployment, domain and email setup, multilingual support, booking systems, analytics, and more. If you need something extra, we'll discuss it and agree on it together. The exact scope of your project is based on the plan you choose and anything else we agree on in writing.

payment.title: How payment works
payment.content: We ask for a small deposit of 10% before we start — this confirms your order and reserves your spot. The remaining 90% is only due once you've seen the result and are happy with it. If after the included revision round you're still not satisfied, you don't have to pay the rest — the deposit simply covers the time we've already invested. We accept bank transfer, card payment, and cash. Prices are in EUR. You will receive a proper invoice for every payment, issued in accordance with Hungarian law.

revisions.title: Revisions
revisions.content: Every plan comes with one round of revisions at no extra charge. This covers adjustments to the design, layout, or text. It doesn't cover starting from scratch or adding features outside the original plan. If you'd like additional changes beyond that, we'll let you know the cost upfront — no surprises.

delivery.title: Delivery timelines
delivery.content: The timelines on our website (e.g. same day, 1–2 days, 3–5 days) are estimates based on typical projects. How long your project takes depends on its complexity and how quickly you can send us your content. We always do our best to deliver on time, but we can't guarantee exact dates. The clock starts once we have everything we need from you (text, images, logo) and the deposit is confirmed. If there's a delay on your side, that doesn't count against our timeline.

client.title: What we need from you
client.content: To build your website, we'll need your content — text, images, logo, and any branding materials. We also ask that you review the preview within about a week. If we don't hear back within 14 business days, we'll consider the project approved. Please also make sure the content you send us is yours to use — we trust that you have the rights to everything you provide.

ownership.title: Who owns what
ownership.content: Once you've paid in full, the website is yours — the design, the content, everything we built for you. You're free to move it, change it, or take it down whenever you want. We may use general-purpose tools and code that aren't specific to your project. We'd also love to feature your site in our portfolio, but if you'd rather we didn't, just let us know.

thirdparty.title: Third-party services
thirdparty.content: Your website may use services from other companies — things like hosting, domain registration, email, or payment processing. These are independent services with their own terms and pricing, which can change over time. We'll help you set everything up, but we can't control how those providers operate.

cancellation.title: Cancellation
cancellation.content: You can cancel your project at any time before you approve the final result. The deposit covers the initial work and isn't refundable. If we've already done a significant amount of work, we may charge a fair amount for what's been completed — we'll always discuss this with you first. On our side, if we don't receive your content within 30 days or can't reach you for over 30 days, we may need to close the project.

warranty.title: After delivery
warranty.content: We stand behind our work. If something isn't working as expected within 30 days of delivery, we'll fix it — as long as it's something on our end. After that, ongoing maintenance or new changes aren't included unless we agree on it separately. We can't guarantee that third-party services (hosting, internet, etc.) will work perfectly at all times — that's outside our control.

liability.title: Our responsibility
liability.content: We take our work seriously, but there are limits to what we can be held responsible for. If something goes wrong, our liability is limited to the amount you paid for the project. We're not responsible for issues caused by changes you make to the website after delivery, or for things outside our control like third-party service outages.

changes.title: Updates to these terms
changes.content: We may update these terms from time to time. When we do, the new version will be posted here. Any project you've already started will follow the terms that were in place when you placed your order.

law.title: Legal details
law.content: These terms follow Hungarian law. If there's ever a disagreement, we'd prefer to work it out together first. Consumer complaints may also be directed to the competent conciliation body. If the dispute cannot be resolved otherwise, the Buda Central District Court or, depending on jurisdiction, the Budapest Capital Regional Court shall have exclusive jurisdiction.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: We do our best to keep everything on this site accurate and current, but we can't guarantee it's always perfect. Any external links are provided for convenience — we're not responsible for what's on other websites.
